Chaotic Curse.name: 混沌诅咒 Chaotic Curse
Chaotic Curse.description:
你聚焦你不祥的凝视，使一种不可预测的恶咒病痛缠上你的敌人。选择60尺内的一个敌人。其成为受诅咒者，效果取决于其针对你职业DC或法术DC中较高者进行的意志豁免，以及在表1上进行一次d20掷骰。在大成功或大失败时，该敌人不受影响。某些结果会为混沌诅咒增加额外的特征，列在括号中。

Your focus your baleful gaze, causing an unpredictable accursed ailment to beset your foe. Choose a foe within 60 feet. They become cursed, with effects depending on their Will save against the higher of your class DC or spell DC, and a d20 roll on table 1. On a critical success, the foe is unaffected. Some results add additional traits to Chaotic Curse, listed in parentheses.

results.1-1: Curse of Clumsiness On a successful save, the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} for 1 round. On a failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} for 1 minute, and on a critical failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 3} for 1 minute.
results.2-2: Curse of Weakness On a successful save, the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 round. On a failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} for 1 minute, and on a critical failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 3} for 1 minute.
results.3-3: Curse of Folly (mental) On a successful save, the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round. On a failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 minute, and on a critical failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 3} for 1 minute.
results.4-4: Curse of Terror (emotion, fear, mental) On a successful save, the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}. On a failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}, and on a critical failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 4}.
results.5-5: Curse of Beguiling (emotion, incapacitation, mental) On a successful save, the foe takes a –1 status penalty to attack rolls against you for 1 round as they're distracted by feelings on friendship @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.Pys9csuzG2ietGxJ]{Effect: Curse of Beguiling}. On a failure, they become friendly for 1 hour, and on a critical failure, they become helpful for 1 hour.
results.6-6: Curse of Lethargy On a successful save, the foe is slowed 1 for 1 round. On a failure, they're slowed 1 for 1 minute, and on a critical failure, they're slowed 2 for 1 round and slowed 1 for 10 minutes.
results.7-7: Curse of Paralysis (incapacitation) On a successful save, the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 round. On a failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} for 1 round, and on a critical failure, they're paralyzed for 2 rounds.
results.8-8: Curse of Exsanguination On a successful save, the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}, but the drained condition ends after 2 rounds. On a failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2}, and on a critical failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 3}.
results.9-9: Curse of Petrification On a successful save, the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 round. On a failure, they're slowed 1 and must attempt a Fortitude save at the end of each of their turns; this ongoing save has the incapacitation trait. On a failed save, the slowed condition increases by 1 (or 2 on a critical failure). A successful save reduces the slowed condition by 1. When a creature is unable to act due to the slowed condition from this curse, the creature is permanently non-magically @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dTwPJuKgBQCMxixg]{Petrified}. The spell ends if the creature is petrified or the slowed condition is removed. On a critical failure, the effect is as failure, but they're initially slowed 2.
results.10-10: Curse of Dying Light (incapacitation) On a successful save, the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} 1 for 1 round. On a failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 minute, and on a critical failure, they're blinded for 1 day.
results.11-11: Curse of Frenzy (emotion, mental) On a successful save, the foe babbles incoherently and is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}. On a failure, the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 minute, but it can attempt a new save at the end of each of its turns to end the confusion. On a critical failure, the target is confused for 1 minute, with no save to end early.
results.12-12: Curse of Torpor On a successful save, the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} for 1 round. On a failure, they're fatigued for 1 minute, and on a critical failure, they're fatigued until they rest.
results.13-13: Curse of Inattention On a successful save, the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} for 1 round. On a failure, they're off-guard for 1 minute and can't take reactions for 1 round, and on a critical failure, they're off-guard and can't take reactions for 1 minute.
results.14-14: Curse of Rooting On a successful save, the foe takes a –15-foot circumstance penalty to their Speeds for 1 round or until they Escape @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.rX8JaFDxhVFD75Q8]{Effect: Curse of Rooting}. On a failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} for 2 rounds or until they Escape. On a critical failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained} for 1 round and immobilized for 1 minute; both effects end early if they Escape.
results.15-15: Curse of Illness On a successful save, the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}. On a failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}, and on a critical failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 3}.
results.16-16: Curse of Shock On a successful save, the foe is @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}. On a failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}, and on a critical failure, they're @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 4}.
results.17-17: Curse of Pacifism (emotion, incapacitation, mental) On a successful save, the foe takes a –1 status penalty to attack rolls due to encroaching feelings of peace for 1 round @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-living-legends-pf2e.yol-effects.Item.MUrOdACIE2kYrt7e]{Effect: Curse of Pacifism}. On a failure, any emotion effects that would affect the foe are suppressed and they can't use hostile actions, either for 2 rounds or until the foe is subject to hostility. On a critical failure, the effect is the same as failure, but it lasts for 1 minute, and hostility doesn't end the effect early.
results.18-18: Curse of Death (death) On a successful save, the foe takes 2 void damage for each level you have (@Damage[(@actor.level*2)[void]]), on a failure, they take 5 void damage for each level you have (@Damage[(@actor.level*5)[void]]), and on a critical failure, they take 10 void damage for each level you have (@Damage[(@actor.level*10)[void]].
results.20-20: Roll twice, rerolling any results of 20.
